title: Sith assault droid (disambiguation)
content:
There were several models of '''[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] assault [[Droid/Legends|droid]]'''. These included:

*[[Mark I assault droid|Assault droid Mark I]]
*[[Mark II assault droid|Assault droid Mark II]]
*[[Mark IV assault droid|Assault droid Mark IV]]

{{Disambig}}
